expectations.text: Spec file uses YYYY-MM-DD-*/SPEC.md naming convention under .specs/features/
expectations.evidence: File named payment-retry-spec.md as flat file in outputs/. No .specs/ directory, no YYYY-MM-DD naming, no SPEC.md convention.

expectations.text: .specs/ directory is initialized with features/, bugs/, and AGENTS.md
Spec contains at least one [NEEDS CLARIFICATION] or [ASSUMPTION] marker
expectations.evidence: No uncertainty markers present. The spec confidently fills in all details (4 retry attempts, specific delay schedule, failure classification, rollout plan) without flagging any as assumptions or open questions in the prescribed marker format.

expectations.text: Technical Approach section references real codebase files (charge.go, subscription.go, or stripe_client.go)
expectations.evidence: Extensively references real files: internal/billing/charge.go:33-58, internal/billing/subscription.go:57-74, internal/billing/stripe_client.go:29-45, internal/models/user.go:30-38, internal/notifications/email.go:9-44.

expectations.text: Spec includes a populated Out of Scope / Non-Goals section with at least one item
expectations.evidence: Non-Goals section with 3 items: re-architecting billing platform, implementing Stripe webhooks, fixing unrelated plan-upgrade bug.

expectations.text: Spec includes an Alternatives Considered section with at least one alternative
expectations.evidence: No Alternatives Considered section exists in the spec.

expectations.text: Verification section contains the exact text 'IMPLEMENTING AGENT' in an HTML comment
expectations.evidence: No IMPLEMENTING AGENT comment. Has a Test Plan section and Implementation Checklist but no agent-directed verification comment.

expectations.text: Probing/discovery questions were generated before the spec draft
expectations.evidence: No probing questions generated. Spec was written directly without discovery phase.

expectations.text: Spec identifies that ChargeResult is consumed by analytics, fraud-detection, or admin dashboard
expectations.evidence: ChargeResult mentioned but external consumers not identified. The spec discusses charge result events but doesn't note the documented consumer contract.
